raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue bowl, a blue container, an orange, and a yellow object are on a wooden table. The orange is a small, round, orange-colored fruit. STRATEGY - Reach for the orange, grasp it, and transport it to a destination (e.g., the blue container). Failure modes include misgrasping the orange or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the orange body; Step 2 grasp the orange body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the orange to the blue container; Step 4 place the orange in the blue container.
Goal: inside(orange, blue_container)
Scene: blue_bowl, blue_container, orange, yellow_object, table
Step 1: reach(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, orange, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, orange) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(orange)
  affordance_region: the body of the orange
  contact: holding(orange) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(orange)
Step 3: transport(orange -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  spatial: above(orange, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(orange)
  done_when: above(orange, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(orange -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(orange, blue_container) [completion]; released(orange) [completion]
  pose: stable(orange) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(orange, blue_container) AND released(orange)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
an empty area inside the blue container
